case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. ENRICO SUNGA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE WAIVER (TRANSACTION ID # 200022557) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
DECLARATION RE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200022557) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNGA, ENRICO DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2020

DECLARATION OF NON MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 200022557) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-05-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNGA, ENRICO $4,462.94 PRINCIPAL, $364.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,826.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200022557)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $364.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200022557) AS TO DEFENDANT SUNGA, ENRICO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-09-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200006946), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE SERVED FEB-03-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-07-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT SUNGA, ENRICO
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200005674) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
